channel.title: Chatgpt-Api on Arrans github.io
channel.description: Recent content in Chatgpt-Api on Arrans github.io

item.title: sashabaranov/go-openai
item.description: OpenAI ChatGPT, GPT-5, GPT-Image-1, Whisper API clients for Go

item.title: promptslab/Awesome-Prompt-Engineering
item.description: This repository contains a hand-curated resources for Prompt Engineering with a focus on Generative Pre-trained Transformer (GPT), ChatGPT, PaLM etc

item.title: louisgv/local.ai
item.description: 🎒 local.ai - Run AI locally on your PC!

item.title: TannerMidd/minimal-chat
item.description: MinimalChat is a lightweight, open-source chat application that allows you to interact with various large language models.
